## What happened

A clear description of the unexpected behavior.

## The prompt

The instruction you gave the agent.

```text

```

## Expected vs. actual

- **Expected:**
- **Actual:**

## Project context

- Was the target a git repo already? (yes/no)
- Did it have an existing README/LICENSE? (yes/no)
- Anything special about it (monorepo, secrets, language/tooling)?

## Additional notes

Logs, screenshots, or the relevant section of `SKILL.md`, if helpful.
